description.value:
Send Medication data MVE building blocks for patient M. XXX_Nederveen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_medicatiegegevens_sturen_MVE
Original description: TEST Medicatiegegevens MVE Scenarioset 9 (diversen MVE)
Send Medication data MVE resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1137891') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68632') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117145') ))).where((quantity.value = 100)).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1101099') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '48291') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '102164') ))).where((quantity.value = 14)).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '768901') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '67903') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2194') ))).where((quantity.value = 50)).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1127047') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '5967') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '16810') ))).where((quantity.value = 30)).count() = 3

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1127047') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '5967') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '16810') ))).where((quantity.value = 30)).count() = 3

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1127047') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '5967') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '16810') ))).where((quantity.value = 30)).count() = 3

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2842246') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '199311') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '179051') ))).where((quantity.value = 30)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1137891|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ACETYLSALICYLZUUR CARDIO AUROBINDO DISP TABL 80MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1127047|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (FUROSEMIDE APOTEX TABLET 40MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1101099|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (MIZOLLEN TABLET MGA 10MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2842246|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (MODAFINIL FOCUS TABLET 200MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '768901|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (PARACETAMOL PCH TABLET 500MG)
